name: io.github.nicktcode/swissgroceries-mcp
description: Swiss grocery search across Migros, Coop, Aldi, Denner, Lidl, Farmy, Volgshop, Otto's.

environmentVariables.name: DENNER_JWT
environmentVariables.description: Optional pre-supplied Denner Bearer JWT. Without it, the adapter self-registers anonymously on first use and rotates the token automatically.

environmentVariables.name: LIDL_DEFAULT_STORE
environmentVariables.description: Default Lidl store ID used when no storeIds are passed. Defaults to CH0149.

environmentVariables.name: SWISSGROCERIES_USER_AGENT_COOP
environmentVariables.description: Override the User-Agent string for Coop calls if DataDome ever blocks the default.

environmentVariables.name: SWISSGROCERIES_LOG_LEVEL
environmentVariables.description: Logging verbosity: silent, info (default), or debug.

environmentVariables.name: SWISSGROCERIES_DISABLE_CACHE
environmentVariables.description: Set to 1 to bypass the in-memory HTTP response cache.
